title: Japanese-Style Ramen Noodle Soup
description: A hearty and comforting Japanese-inspired noodle soup made with a rich pork broth, topped with crispy tempura bits and green onions.
instructions: In a large pot, combine pork bones and 4 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.
Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean pot, discarding the solids.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil to the broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a pan, heat some sesame oil and cook sliced mushrooms until tender.
Add tempura bits to the pan and cook until crispy.
To assemble the soup, place cooked noodles in a bowl, then add hot broth and top with green onions, sliced scallions, and tempura bits.
